_comment: Edit this to control what the pipeline pulls. Product codes are the FDA's device classification buckets; keywords sweep device_name to catch IPL devices filed under other codes.

_product_code_reference.OHT: OTC IPL hair removal — THE home/consumer IPL category (Fansizhe, Semlamp, Ulike, Braun, Nood, etc.)
_product_code_reference.OHS: OTC LED light, wrinkle reduction — adjacent home light devices, NOT IPL but same buyers
_product_code_reference.GEX: Professional/prescription IPL & laser systems (clinic) — 2800+ records, broad. Add only if you want the pro landscape.

_to_widen_scope: Set product_codes to ["OHT","OHS","OLP"] for the full home light-device market, or add "GEX" for professional IPL.
_keywords_note: device_name phrase sweep. Multi-word terms are auto-quoted as exact phrases (unquoted terms OR-explode in openFDA). Catches IPL devices filed under a product code not listed above; deduped against the code-based pull.
_since_note: Set to a date like "2023-01-01" to limit to recent clearances, or null for the full history.
